2605.05538.title: AgenticRAG: Agentic Retrieval for Enterprise Knowledge Bases
2605.05538.paper_summary: We present AgenticRAG, a practical agentic harness for retrieval and analysis over enterprise knowledge bases. Standard RAG pipelines place significant burden of grounding on the search stack, constraining the language model to a fixed candidate set chosen deep in the retrieval process. Our approach reduces this overdependence by layering a lightweight harness on top of existing enterprise search infrastructure, equipping a reasoning LLM with search, find, open, and summarize tools enabling the model to iteratively retrieve information, navigate within documents, and analyze evidence autonomously. On three open benchmarks we observe substantial gains: $49.6\%$ recall@1 on BRIGHT (+21.8 pp over the best embedding baseline), 0.96 factuality on WixQA ($+13\%$ relative improvement), and $92\%$ answer correctness on FinanceBench--within 2 pp of oracle access to true evidence. Ablation studies show that the most significant factor is the shift from single-shot retrieval to agentic tool use ($5.9\times$ improvement), while multi-query search and in-document navigation contribute to both quality and efficiency. We present various design choices in our agentic harness that were informed by pre-production deployments. Our results demonstrate its suitability for real-world enterprise production environments.
2605.05538.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了AgenticRAG，一種實用的代理式工具，用於檢索和分析企業知識庫。標準的RAG管道將大量的基礎工作負擔放在搜索堆疊上，限制了語言模型只能選擇在檢索過程中深度選擇的固定候選集。我們的方法通過在現有企業搜索基礎設施之上層疊一個輕量級的工具，減少了對這種過度依賴，為推理LLM配備了搜索、查找、打開和總結工具，使模型能夠迭代地檢索信息、在文檔中導航並自主分析證據。在三個開放基準上，我們觀察到顯著的增益：在BRIGHT上達到$49.6\%$的recall@1（比最佳嵌入基線提高了21.8個百分點），在WixQA上達到0.96的事實性（相對改善13%），在FinanceBench上達到$92\%$的答案正確率——與對真實證據的預言訪問僅相差2個百分點。消融研究顯示，最重要的因素是從單次檢索轉變為代理工具的使用（改善了$5.9\times$），而多查詢搜索和文檔內導航對質量和效率都有貢獻。我們展示了在我們的代理式工具中做出的各種設計選擇，這些選擇是基於預生產部署的啟發。我們的結果證明了其在現實世界企業生產環境中的適用性。
2605.05538.author: Susheel Suresh et.al.
2605.05538.authors: Susheel Suresh, Hazel Mak, Shangpo Chou, Fred Kroon, Sahil Bhatnagar
